headline: Choose how you want to engage with the studio.
description: From hands-on learning to custom project work, each path is crafted with the same material care and editorial finish.

items.title: Workshops & Classes
items.description: Learn wheel and hand-building techniques in guided sessions for all levels.

image.alt: Hands shaping clay during a workshop session.

items.title: Private Events
items.description: Host team gatherings and celebrations with a premium clay experience.

image.alt: Guests glazing ceramics in an atelier event setting.

items.title: Gift Card
items.description: Give access to classes, products, and bespoke studio moments.

image.alt: Curated ceramic pieces suitable as a gift experience.

items.title: Commissions
items.description: Collaborate on custom ceramics for homes, hospitality, and projects.

image.alt: Custom studio ceramic forms displayed as commission work.
